description: Modify a single edge by ID.

keywords.name: control-point
keywords.description: Modify control points of the edge. Must be followed by an 'add', 'clear', 'move', or 'remove' sub-keyword. Control points apply to non-line edge types (arc, spline, curve).

keywords.name: control-point-add
keywords.description: Add a control point at location v , a 2D coordinate vector ( \(x,y\) ). If local is used, then the location is in a coordinate system defined by the edge, where \(x\) goes from end 1 at 0.0 to end 2 at 1.0, and \(y\) is normal to that.

keywords.name: control-point-clear
keywords.description: Remove all control points from the edge.

keywords.name: control-point-move
keywords.description: Move the control point with positional index i to location v , a 2D coordinate vector ( \(x,y\) ).

keywords.name: control-point-remove
keywords.description: Remove one or more control points. If integer i is supplied, remove only the control point at that positional index. With no index, removes all control points (same as 'clear').

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: Assign the group name s1 in slot s2 (if supplied) to the edge. The edge is removed from the group/slot if remove is present. If the slot keyword is omitted, the slot is set to the slot named Default .

keywords.name: ratio
keywords.description: Set the ratio f (a number between 0.1 and 10.0 ), which is used to distribute zone lengths along the edge (each zone will be f of the size of the zone preceding it). This setting automatically propagates across dependent edges of regular blocks while ratio-isolate is false .

keywords.name: ratio-isolate
keywords.description: The option only applies to the edges which form regular (3- or 4-sided) blocks. Set the flag to control ratio propagation. Ratio settings propagate when false (the default). If set true , a ratio assignment on this edge will not propagate to dependent edges.

keywords.name: size
keywords.description: Set the number of zones on the edge. This will also automatically propagate across dependent edges of regular blocks.

keywords.name: split
keywords.description: Split the edge at location v , a 2D coordinate vector ( \(x,y\) ). If the edge belongs to an irregular block (or no block), the command splits the edge and deletes the block. If block is supplied and the edge belongs to a regular block, the split is propagated across all connected regular blocks. tolerance-merge specifies the tolerance for merging points during splitting.

keywords.name: type
keywords.description: Specify the curve type of the edge. Must be followed by an 'arc', 'curve', 'polyline', 'simple', or 'spline' sub-keyword.

keywords.name: type-polyline
keywords.description: Specify a polyline edge (default; a straight-line segmented edge).
